text.title: ads-twitter-ads Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-twitter-ads as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Targeting broad interest categories without follower lookalike refinement.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Twitter's interest taxonomy is imprecise; broad interests produce high CPMs with low conversion rates because the audience pool includes tangentially interested users.

failure-mode.description: Using highly polished, design-heavy creative with prominent brand elements.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Polished ads are immediately identified as advertisements and scrolled past; native-looking conversational ads achieve 2-3x higher engagement on Twitter's feed.

failure-mode.description: Launching only one ad variation per campaign.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: No variation means no optimization path; Twitter's algorithm cannot identify the best creative, and a single underperforming ad exhausts budget with no recourse.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Negative or unanswered replies appear under the ad to all subsequent viewers; unmonitored negative sentiment actively damages conversion rates for the entire campaign duration.

failure-mode.description: Running the same creative for more than 3 weeks to small niche audiences.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Frequency fatigue in small audiences (under 500K) degrades engagement rates and inflates CPCs; creative must be rotated before the audience burns out.
